name: Chạm Yêu Thương
description: Participating as a volunteer in the “Chạm Yêu Thương” program by Techcombank, within the “Gieo Hy Vọng” project, I contributed through theatrical performances, guided children diagnosed with leukemia, and assisted teachers in daily activities. This experience enhanced my empathy, communication skills, and sense of social responsibility in a meaningful educational context.

name: VPBank Super Cup Pickleball Open 2026
description: Volunteered at the VPBank Super Cup Pickleball Open 2026, supporting referees in scorekeeping and verification, coordinating athlete check-ins, managing first-aid supplies, and distributing equipment and hydration across courts. This experience strengthened my attention to detail, multitasking, and teamwork, enabling me to operate efficiently in fast-paced environments and ensure smooth event execution.
